name: Cohen & Steers, Inc.
description: Cohen & Steers, Inc. is a global investment manager specializing in real assets and alternative income, including real estate, infrastructure, resource equities, commodity strategies, and preferred securities. Founded in 1986, the firm is headquartered in New York City, with offices in London, Dublin, Hong Kong, Tokyo, and Singapore. Cohen & Steers serves institutional and individual investors globally, delivering active investment solutions designed to provide income, diversification, and inflation protection.
